race.comment: LUCIFER'S LADY (11) finished off impressively from a long way back last start, beaten only 1.5L at Belmont. Out in trip now looks a good move for her and she maps to get every chance from a good draw. Can raise the bar again today and that will see her very hard to beat. YANKEE ACE (2) jumps right out to 2013m for the first time today but he does have a strong fitness base under him. His racing style suggests the longer journey should suit him today and Faithfull hopping on board is a good push for his chances. Can improve drastically. ANGELS POINT (4) jumps right out in trip today third-up into the campaign. He closed steadily last start at Belmont and this may be what he's looking for now. Still has some upside and can't be left out. GOKANA (8) is better than he showed last start and can improve. STAR ASSAULT (10) won't be far away.
